criteria.name: Backend Engineering Experience & Language Proficiency
criteria.description: Demonstrates 5+ years of backend engineering experience with demonstrated expertise in Python, Go, or both at scale.
criteria.score_10_means: 10+ years of professional backend experience with production expertise in both Python and Go, or 7+ years deeply specialized in one language at senior level.

criteria.name: High-Throughput & Low-Latency Systems
criteria.description: Proven experience designing, building, or operating systems handling >10k requests/second with documented latency optimization.
criteria.score_10_means: Multiple shipped systems handling 100k+ req/s with sub-100ms p99 latencies, with documented architectural decisions and performance metrics.

criteria.name: Real-Time Data & WebSocket Infrastructure
criteria.description: Hands-on experience building or maintaining WebSocket-based systems, real-time data pipelines, or event streaming architectures.
criteria.score_10_means: Designed and deployed production WebSocket systems with experience in Kafka/RabbitMQ event-driven architectures handling real-time market or transactional data.

criteria.name: Financial Systems & Trading Domain Knowledge
criteria.description: Direct experience working on trading platforms, payment processors, or regulated financial systems with understanding of domain-specific challenges.
criteria.score_10_means: 3+ years in fintech/trading infrastructure with demonstrable knowledge of order execution, settlement, compliance, or real-time pricing systems.

criteria.name: Data Persistence & Database Expertise
criteria.description: Production proficiency with PostgreSQL and at least one NoSQL database (Redis, MongoDB, Cassandra, etc.) in high-throughput contexts.
criteria.score_10_means: Expert-level PostgreSQL optimization (indexing, query tuning, replication) plus deep NoSQL experience; experience with database scaling under high load.

criteria.name: Containerization & Distributed Systems
criteria.description: Practical experience deploying and managing containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes in production environments.
criteria.score_10_means: Shipped multiple services on Kubernetes with hands-on experience in networking, persistence, orchestration, and debugging distributed async systems.
